title: Automate hour column
excerpt:
I am quit new in Monday. 
I inserted the hour column from the board power ups. 
I couldn’t find a way to atomize the hour upon creation (You could only atomize the date). 
Is there a way ? 
Thanks in advance, 
Talia Goza…

posts.author: Talia (Talia Gozali)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am quit new in Monday.

posts.cookedHtml: i need to know this too. Any one have any idea?
